entries.definition:
b-ʿ-th-r to scatter, to strew about; to squander; to
disarrange, to turn inside out. Of this root, بُعْثِرَ buʿthira occurs
twice in the Qurʾan.

بُعْثِرَ buʿthira [pass. quad. v.] to be strewn about, to be scattered
all over; to be turned inside out (82:4) وَإِذَا الْقُبُورُ بُعْثِرَتْ when graves
are turned inside out.
